title: Vanilla Overloaded
description: A combination of over 240 Performance mods and quality of life mods and resource packs collected from the YouTubers: Kasaisora, DemonjoeTV, and Distruptive builds.
body:
# modpack information:
A combination of over 240 Performance mods and quality of life mods and resource packs collected from the YouTubers: Kasaisora, DemonjoeYT, and Distruptive builds.
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddabfdd8fe4bf2f8c7834a8296e6dd4890517b7b.png)

Some of them might _not_ look Vanilla Friendly, but it's just funny.
## The reason of this modpack:
Vanilla Overloaded aims to enhance the Vanilla feel in a modded way (while adding additional stuff), that makes the Vanilla Minecraft feel more lively(_and cursed_); by adding **over 200 mods, resource packs, datapacks, and shaders**. Plus adding some performance mods to the mix to make it all run, y'now.
## Youtubers:
This is a list of the Youtubers that I've collected from them most of the content:
- [Kasaisora](https://www.youtube.com/@KasaiSora)

- [Demonjoe](https://www.youtube.com/@demonjoe) (most of the content from him)

- [Distruptive Builds](https://www.youtube.com/@disruptivebuilds)

- And including some of my selection too! (_YT channel coming soon..._)
## Main content:
here are the list of _some_ of the contents in this Modpack: (therels a LOT to cover)

<details>
<summary>Contents included:</summary>
  
- [Powder snow alerts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/powder-snow-alerts)
  
- [Entity culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)

- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)

- [Sus sand](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sus-sand) 

- [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes)

- [fzzy config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config)

- [iChunUtil](https://modrinth.com/mod/ichunutil)

- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)

- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair)

- [FancyFast Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancyfast-bushy-leaves)

- [Music Delay Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-delay-reducer)

- [Block Staffs (Resource Pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/block-staffs)

- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)

- [Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info)

- [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view)

- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)

- [Item Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter)

- [oSzoukaua's: Bee Small](https://modrinth.com/mod/oszoukauas-bee-small)

- [Minecraft Cursor](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)

- [Better Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-capes-x)

- [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects)

- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)

- [Better Selection](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-selection)

- [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove)

- [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust)

- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
  
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
  
- [Cicada](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada)
  
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

- [VTDownloader](https://modrinth.com/mod/vtdownloader)

- And many, MANY more (I'm too lazy to type all that in)

</details>


## Additional content:
Some content isn't in the modpack because it's on Curseforge or on Vanilla Tweaks, so here they are, listed down below:

<details>
<summary>The Extras:</summary>

- [Enchanting Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enchanting-reimagined)
- [Recolorful containers (Light Mode)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/recolourful-containers-gui-hud)
- [Recolorful containers (Dark Mode)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/recolourful-containers-gui-hud-dark)
- [Vanilla Tweaks (Fully Customizable)](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- [Splendous Sniffers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/splendous-sniffers)
- [Armorstands Reimagined (optional)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/armorstands-reimagined)

</details>
